message:
fix: handle MissionLifecycleState::Paused in CLI transition plans + clippy/proptest fixes

- Add Paused variant to 3 match arms in mission_{run,pause,resume}_transition_plan
  (binary crate failed to compile without this)
- Pause now transitions to Paused instead of Blocked (semantic correctness)
- Fix 2 clippy warnings in mission_loop.rs (clone_from, redundant_closure)
- Fix prop_assert_ne! ownership issue in proptest_idempotency_resume.rs
  (String moved across multiple assertions)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
